Quality Education.reason: Focus on language skills aligns with Target 4.6 ('achieve literacy and numeracy').
The course provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops literacy skills (Target 4.6). It also fosters an 'international perspective,' contributing to global citizenship (Target 4.7).
evidence: To possess basic language proficiency and application skills

evidence: To possess basic language proficiency and application skills

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Fostering an 'international perspective' promotes intercultural understanding, a foundation for peaceful societies. The 'Respect Copyright' rule also touches upon the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: By teaching the Thai language and fostering an 'international perspective,' the course facilitates knowledge sharing and capacity-building, which are foundational for international partnerships (Target 17.6, 17.9).
